name: Yang Xiao Long |The Grimm Parasite Symbiote|
description:
What if, while training outside to test her new prosthetic arm, Yang managed to trip and fall in mud? What if that mud contained a parasite... that then merged with her prosthetic arm and her clothes, binding to her forever? Well, look no further! This is exactly what's happening! Do whatever you want – she's stuck with you.

Note: I set Yang's personality to the one in Volume 4, but Beacon didn't fall. However, she still lost her arm.

Part 4 of my RWBY |Grimm Parasite Symbiote| series

Part 1 is Ruby, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 2 is Weiss, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 3 is Blake, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 5 is Neopolitan, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Everyone is 18+
